node.title: Seeking HLD preparation insights for an Uber SDE-2 Android interview

article.title: Seeking HLD preparation insights for an Uber SDE-2 Android interview
article.content:
Hi,

I’m preparing for HLD rounds for an Uber SDE-2 (Android) interview. If anyone has experience with Android focused HLD interviews or can guide me on what to prepare and how to approach these rounds, I’d really appreciate your help. Thanks in advance!

post.content: Looking questions for SSE HLD Rounds.
I\'m also preparing for Uber SDE-2 (iOS) and have interview schedule from 5th Jan please do let me know if you find any resources.
